REGCAT: Length, Bag and Possession Limits Vary by Water
SEASON_TXT: First Saturday in April at 5:00 a.m. to Oct. 15.
EARLY_SEASON_TXT: First Saturday in January to First Saturday in April all trout shall be immediately released. Only artificial lures may be used.

GEAR_RESTRICTIONS: From September 15 to the first Saturday of the following May, you may not use hooks that have a gap size larger than one-half inch from point to shank.  Click 'View Additional Details' to learn more about special night fishing regulations
BAG_LMT: 5 trout and salmon in total; minimum length limit 10"
SPECIALREG1: Special Regulation: From Sep 15 to Dec 31, fishing by any method is prohibited from one-half hour after sunset to one-half hour before sunrise. From Jan 1 to first Saturday in May, hook and line fishing is prohibited from one-half hour after sunset to one-half hour before sunrise.
